description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service and two stages: build and test. Add a build-image job in the build stage that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, pulls $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:base, changes directory to /builds/elRepo.io/Tier1/, builds the image with docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest -f latest.Dockerfile . and pushes the resulting image. Add a test-forum-propagation job in the test stage that installs bash via apk add --no-cache bash and runs bash -e ./forumsTestPropagation.sh, falling back to bash -e -x ./forumsTestPropagation.sh on failure. Add a test-jsonapi job in the test stage that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY, pulls $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, runs a container named tier1 from that image with retroshare-service --jsonApiPort 9092, executes a series of curl commands against the JSON API endpoints (version, getChatLobbyList, getLocations, createLocation with JSON payload, getLocations, isLoggedIn, getChatLobbyList), and finally stops the tier1 container.
